title: "Privacy Law Roundup — June 19, 2026"
date: 2026-06-19 13:08:01 +0530
categories: [news, roundup]
tags: [dpdpa, india, privacy, global, news]
---

## India: DPDPA Officially in Force
India's Digital Personal Data Protection Act (DPDPA) 2023, along with its accompanying 2025 Rules, has officially come into effect, marking a significant shift in the nation's data privacy landscape. This activation ushers in a new era of enforcement and compliance obligations for data fiduciaries and data principals across the country.
([Source](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiekFVX3lxTFA0MUhxR2JRbkZEUG81Smp1Uy02Z0xtdWZYSnlyLVJVSHQ2eWtleENVY2Iya2tVTUNveFE5Mm1FLUVwd01icDNwT0pqcFZyOGJVNmZSRGJoSjJUT21BOWxkOXFqTmhVRmNSVW5jSGFyQkVlblRoR2FTX01R), [Source](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiuwFBVV95cUxQdHdLdVFjdzNOd2JqQWxMUEJ2aS1kMEV5Ylp4TllRNFh0dmRqb1lZREhLMlQzLUJWNGlBaS1GRDhEelJEeU9VMlJFS0o1ald2aHFIaDVYMEZXaHlBYUN6VHJ4N3lLd09NdFJRZ0s3Um5zQjdJQl9LaXM0N0NFak5JZkVLdS1TWkY1dnpOTV9yMG9JUFZlRGlHQkJnM3E0NmxnaUxZbEg2NmVkVjZKY2luYThubXJSX0t5bDA4), [Source](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiswFBVV95cUxQdUpJd3Z3OTkwOTlFTEt0eUlMZzBsRC01UjQzN3RZQTJmbkoxcE1oaWtwM1hmM1NVMGZOSmYzV1NMcG1pdlR4Y2VER1V5b1ZuUWVEalcxX2QtVHNuRVEyM2czYWppcy10MHVWSzgtbDBqdG1KQndHSTJKT2ZvNDEtQURuQ2Y1ZjNuNm50cmVTSDFSMzJYQXFxZDFBSzdNMTY3eEgxMG43c2NaNVlQS1E5TjJUcw), [Source](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMisAFBVV95cUxQakx6Y1RYS0lCdGEzN1VfZENmenhLRVZRWUViVUNwZHRCZzhZbDJFYkN4UUdOb1NKZzFKUHdIQnRxWDVINnhTaWY5Ml9IUFppTW44ZkVZeTFzTndwaUo2bl9GYmpHU3U4dmV5UEtGbHdXbG93OGs4QXBSQ3I5Ums5SDFGREdYRHdJQXp2YkpzcTVHaC0wLV9qaDlRRnp2Y25obXhIQVdjSHhsbjZFa0wwTA), [Source](https://news.google.))

## India: Data Protection Board & Compliance Guidance
MeitY has initiated the process of appointing a chairperson and members for the Data Protection Board of India, a critical step towards establishing the enforcement mechanism for the DPDPA. Meanwhile, businesses are actively seeking guidance, with firms like KPMG offering insights into the DPDP Rules 2025 and the fundamentals of compliance.
([Source](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiyAFBVV95cUxOaVR4MW9NWUdLSkM5eEVJNFlNeWJBVVRRNzZaU3d0VGdlMlh0V0ExNlNrU2lUdllVMGpYdFFGQ3lIZ1kyOEFIbXNlWks2cHFSX2lTRlB4d1gxY1NDbU1FV3NfRFVYYTB2V29haVpVTEYyWmtDeHFHLURaYnZyaUtlTlptazN3dTc0cVVIajJoenhPTEVCRTFLZjlfVW94OU1YT0U5RWV2VjdZNnJULUlqd1ViM2RBQm02Ti1GTVpWc1hPNnUwZk5XdA), [Source](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMinAFBVV95cUxOVVFRVlVhNFByNkE0d0RoU2ZUd0FjNEdoLTdHQ3VRRFBvdUN1LU5YcG9TWkROcWVPTTREbW1Cb1BabTJCRVI1MlAtdW1zYXBtcGhSWXFNR2ZWRkJzNjAydXVfRFBXX2dxS0VDdTB3SlRBYjdEdjR6N3g5dHVwOUZNWktMbkxVeWNWV2lrYXRTUlVhMnNabjdGWnVkRFo), [Source](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMixwFBVV95cUxNZG5MSDhBRmpzczRjbkh2b1F3SFljbGl3VlEzMkFnYnZkNTJ4VTI4bkpuZmtSV3lqbTRiV3d6YWFmdnJTVS1sVklTcGM2U2NzQXBIV0pQWU9UZEYxQW15VEE5SWpLNGlfVXdqbWR3QzFaVU9lVXkxeHU3dGxYRTZRWGU1djh3c3VBQkx3WnduTlZpaElqM1ZYYzNtTEdJOGpybEZkbS1XZElzMWR6Z3BKd1hZcTFmNXl4b1d6VmRXd3hyWmxzOXB3))

## India: Legal Challenges & Interpretational Debates
The Supreme Court has acknowledged constitutional challenges against the DPDPA and its 2025 Rules, indicating potential legal scrutiny ahead. Experts also highlight interpretational uncertainties within the Act, particularly concerning the lack of a statutory definition for "harm" and other perceived regulatory gaps, which could complicate future adjudications.
([Source](https://news.google.
